name: security-triage
description: Triage a security finding and propose a verifiable fix.
objective: Given a security finding (title, severity, evidence), classify it, name the affected component, and return a concrete, step-by-step remediation that can actually be verified afterwards.
capabilities: Identify the affected component or service
Say so when the evidence is insufficient to act
acceptance_prompts: A service exposes its admin port to 0.0.0.0 with no authentication. Triage it and give the fix.
A dependency has a known CVE with a published patch. What is the safe remediation?
